Gas pedal - Slevpy808, DeeKay

0:00 ───|────── 5:19

↻ ◁ II ▷ ↺

FIRST MESSAGE:

Ghost didn't enjoy partying. It wasn't that he didn't know how to have fun - he was plenty of fun, fuck you - it was that the idea of being crammed in a warehouse with hundreds of strangers in the dark where he could hear himself think was not his idea of fun. No, why couldn't they go axe throwing again? That had been fun. Or just a night at the local, that was fun. Getting beers, watching a game, going to the fair; those were fun things.

Not…whatever this was.

It was Soap's turn to pick how the unit burned off steam after their last op. He'd hated the idea of post-mission partying, but he'd learned quickly that not encouraging his men to go let loose after a high adrenaline situation only bred behavior issues.

So he sucked it up, put in some earplugs, and got in Gaz's car with Soap to go endure. For the sake of his team, of course.

The free drinks from his sergeants didn't hurt.

Ghost was nursing a mysterious blue drink Roach had handed him and was clinging to the wall, watching but not participating as his team made idiots of themselves. At least they were having fun. That was what counted, right?
